title: Circle Circumference Calculator - Calculate Perimeter
description: Free circle circumference calculator. Calculate the circumference (perimeter) of a circle from radius or diameter. Also shows area.
keywords: circle circumference calculator, perimeter of circle, circle calculator, circumference formula
intro: Calculate the circumference of a circle. Enter the radius or diameter to get the circumference and area.

faq.q: What is the formula for circumference?
faq.a: Circumference = 2πr = πd, where r is the radius and d is the diameter.

faq.q: How to find circumference from diameter?
faq.a: Multiply the diameter by π (≈3.14159). Example: diameter 10 → circumference = 10 × π ≈ 31.42.
